Adaptive_Patch_Selection.paper_detail: Saliency-map-based adaptive patch selection with pattern diversity constraint.
Adaptive_Patch_Selection.current_implementation: Dynamic TF data pipeline heuristic (edge + luminance/color variance).
Adaptive_Patch_Selection.target_implementation: Offline script `src/datasets/alamp_paper_patch_selector.py` approximating saliency via OpenCV (if available) or spectral residual + pattern diversity.

Overlap_Constraint.paper_detail: Spatial distance / overlap constraint enforced between patches.
Overlap_Constraint.target_implementation: IoU non-maximum suppression or explicit distance penalty.

Shared_CNN_Backbone.target_implementation: Shared VGG16 backbone (ImageNet weights, fc-equivalent pooling).

Orderless_Aggregation.target_implementation: Global average/max pooling or attention-based pooling across the patch axis.
